top_3_actions.action: Differentiate these 4 listings. Options: different subjects (couple vs pet vs family), different sizes or formats (8x10 vs 16x20, framed vs unframed), different styles (realistic vs impressionist), or bundle them into a single listing with variations. Each listing should have a clearly different first photo so buyers can tell them apart in search results.
